positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. The main subjects are large, bioluminescent mushrooms clustered around a winding, stylized river, viewed from a slight overhead angle. The overall composition should be symmetrical and intricate, suitable for a central t-shirt graphic. Use a deep, twilight color palette (indigo, sapphire blue, teal, with vibrant neon accents of magenta and electric lime green) to achieve high contrast. The lighting is ambient and ethereal, emanating primarily from the flora and fauna, creating strong rim lights and silhouettes. The style should be a modern digital line art mixed with stained-glass texture, emphasizing clean, strong vector lines and graphic depth. Focus on geometric patterns within the nature elements.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, copyright, blurry, abstract, low resolution, artifact, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, noise, poor composition, gradient, photorealism
